creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Guido Falsi from comment #7)
> 
> I tested following these steps using the binary package from the official
> FreeBSD mirrors and the web interface works, I cannot access the static
> pages, and there could be a bug there in the port I'm going to investigate,
> but other standard asterisk urls like
> http://localhost:8088/asterisk/httpstatus are working fine and asterisk is
> not crashing.

I have also been able to access the static files, for example http://localhost:8088/asterisk/static/ajamdemo.html, it did not work at first because I was using a wrong URL path.

The link given in the web page you pointed me to(http://localhost:8088/asterisk/static/config/index.html) cannot work with the FreeBSD port, because it does not install those files in the /usr/local/share/asterisk/static-http/ directory.
